mapper.select:
SELECT id, hospital_id, department_name, parent_department_name, department_intro, service_scope, active_status, deleted, gender_rule, age_min, age_max, crowd_tags_json, standard_dept_code, subspecialty_code, is_emergency, national_key_score, provincial_key_score, city_key_score, authority_score, create_time, update_time FROM hospital_department
AND department_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY department_name ASC
